## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Workflow runtime
- [ ] MCP server/tooling
- [ ] Role prompt or artifact contract
- [ ] Traceability, evidence, or audit behavior
- [ ] Global memory behavior
- [ ] Documentation or examples
- [ ] Tests or CI

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run verify`
- [ ] `npm run pack:dry`
- [ ] Added or updated tests where behavior changed
- [ ] Updated docs/examples when public behavior changed

## Traceability Impact

Does this change affect any of these chains?

- [ ] product goal -> requirement -> task -> ChangeSet -> evidence -> review -> release
- [ ] file change -> requirement -> decision -> agent -> evidence -> rollback
